Education.name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
Education.description: Integrated scheme for school education covering pre-school to class 12.

Education.name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme (PM POSHAN)
Education.description: Provides free lunch to school children to improve nutrition and attendance.

Education.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
Education.description: Scholarship for economically weaker students to reduce dropouts at class 8.

Education.name: PM e-Vidya
Education.description: Digital learning initiative to provide online education resources.

Education.name: National Digital Library of India (NDLI)
Education.description: Provides access to millions of digital books and learning resources.

Education.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
Education.description: Single-window platform for scholarships offered by central and state governments.

Education.name: Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA)
Education.description: Improves access, equity, and quality in higher education institutions.

Education.name: National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL)
Education.description: Provides free online courses and certification in engineering and sciences.

Education.name: SWAYAM
Education.description: Massive open online courses platform for free learning.

Education.name: Ishan Uday Scholarship (NER)
Education.description: Scholarship for students from North Eastern Region pursuing higher education.

Health.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
Health.description: Provides free health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.

Health.name: National Health Mission (NHM)
Health.description: Strengthens healthcare delivery across rural and urban areas.

Health.name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY)
Health.description: Establishes AIIMS-like institutions and upgrades government medical colleges.

Health.name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer, Diabetes, Cardiovascular Diseases and Stroke (NPCDCS)
Health.description: Provides preventive, diagnostic, and treatment services for non-communicable diseases.

Health.name: Pradhan Mantri Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission (PM-ABHIM)
Health.description: Strengthens public health infrastructure across India.

Health.name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
Health.description: Provides community-based mental health services and awareness.

Health.name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)
Health.description: Prevention and control of malaria, dengue, chikungunya, and other vector-borne diseases.

Women.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
Women.description: Promotes institutional delivery among poor pregnant women.

Women.name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)
Women.description: Prevention and control of HIV/AIDS through awareness and treatment.

Women.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
Women.description: Promotes gender equality and education for girl children.

Women.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
Women.description: Provides financial assistance to pregnant and lactating women for wage loss compensation.

Women.name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
Women.description: Provides nutrition, health, and preschool education services to children under 6 years and mothers.

Women.name: One Stop Centre Scheme
Women.description: Provides integrated support services to women affected by violence.

Women.name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
Women.description: Provides safe and affordable accommodation for working women.

Women.name: National Creche Scheme
Women.description: Provides daycare facilities for children of working mothers.

Women.name: Mahila Shakti Kendra (MSK)
Women.description: Empowers rural women through community participation and skill development.

Women.name: Ujjawala Scheme
Women.description: Provides prevention, rescue, rehabilitation, and reintegration services for victims of trafficking.

Women.name: Child Protection Services Scheme
Women.description: Ensures care, protection, and rehabilitation of children in need.

Women.name: National Nutrition Mission (POSHAN Abhiyaan)
Women.description: Improves nutritional outcomes for children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.

Farmers.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
Farmers.description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to small and marginal farmers.

Farmers.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
Farmers.description: Issues soil health cards to farmers to improve productivity through balanced fertilizer use.

Farmers.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
Farmers.description: Promotes efficient irrigation practices to ensure 'Har Khet Ko Pani'.

Farmers.name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
Farmers.description: Provides an online trading platform for agricultural commodities.

Farmers.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
Farmers.description: Supports state-level projects to improve agricultural productivity and infrastructure.

Farmers.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
Farmers.description: Crop insurance scheme to protect farmers against yield losses due to natural calamities.

Farmers.name: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
Farmers.description: Promotes sustainable practices like soil conservation, water-use efficiency, and organic farming.

Farmers.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
Farmers.description: Encourages organic farming through cluster-based approaches.

Farmers.name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
Farmers.description: Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, and coarse cereals sustainably.

Farmers.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan-Dhan Yojana (PM-KMY)
Farmers.description: Provides pension benefits to small and marginal farmers after retirement.

Employment.name: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
Employment.description: Credit-linked subsidy program to generate self-employment opportunities through micro-enterprises.

Employment.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
Employment.description: Skill development program for rural youth to enhance employability.

Employment.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
Employment.description: Provides financial support to establishments to promote apprenticeship training.

Employment.name: Skill India Mission
Employment.description: Umbrella program to train over 40 crore people in different skills by 2022.

Employment.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
Employment.description: Provides guaranteed 100 days of wage employment to rural households.

Tourism & Culture.name: Incredible India Tourism Campaign
Tourism & Culture.description: Promotes India as a global tourist destination through branding and marketing.

Tourism & Culture.name: PRASAD Scheme
Tourism & Culture.description: Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive for developing pilgrimage sites.

Tourism & Culture.name: HRIDAY Scheme
Tourism & Culture.description: National Heritage City Development and Augmentation Yojana for preserving heritage cities.

Tourism & Culture.name: National Mission on Libraries (NML)
Tourism & Culture.description: Modernizes public libraries to provide digital access and resources.

Tourism & Culture.name: Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat (EBSB)
Tourism & Culture.description: Promotes cultural exchange and national integration among states and union territories.

Tourism & Culture.name: Khelo India Programme
Tourism & Culture.description: Promotes sports culture by identifying and nurturing young talent.

Tourism & Culture.name: Fit India Movement
Tourism & Culture.description: Encourages citizens to adopt healthy lifestyles and fitness practices.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Digital India Programme
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Transforms India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: National Supercomputing Mission (NSM)
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Establishes a network of supercomputers for scientific research and innovation.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: National Mission on Quantum Technologies and Applications (NM-QTA)
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Promotes research and development in quantum computing and communication.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Bharatmala Pariyojana
Digital & Infrastructure.description: National highway development program to improve road connectivity across India.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Sagarmala Programme
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Port-led development initiative to modernize ports and promote coastal shipping.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Smart Cities Mission
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Develops 100 smart cities with sustainable urban infrastructure and technology-driven governance.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT)
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Provides basic urban infrastructure like water supply, sewerage, and green spaces.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Provides all-weather road connectivity to unconnected rural habitations.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Regional Connectivity Scheme - UDAN
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Enhances regional air connectivity by making air travel affordable.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Metro Rail Projects
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Supports metro rail systems in major cities to improve urban transport.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: National Infrastructure Pipeline (NIP)
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Provides a roadmap for investment in infrastructure projects across sectors.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Industrial Corridors Programme
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Develops industrial corridors to boost manufacturing and logistics infrastructure.

Digital & Infrastructure.name: Dedicated Freight Corridor Project
Digital & Infrastructure.description: Constructs freight-only railway corridors to improve goods transport efficiency.
